nasb.text: Every place on which the sole of your foot treads, I have given it to you, just as I spoke to Moses.

esv.text: Every place that the sole of your foot will tread upon I have given to you, just as I promised to Moses.

cnv.text: 你們腳掌踏過的每一處地方，我都照著我應許摩西的賜給你們了。

ccb.text: 我已把你们脚掌将踏之地都赐给了你们，正如我对摩西的应许。
